actions.title: Publish a how-to: Reviewing multilingual contracts with Legora
actions.rationale: Prompts in your topic 'AI-powered document review tools' frequently mention multilingual review, but no own-domain article ranks for it. Competitors are cited via long-form how-to guides.

actions.title: Comparison page: Legora vs Harvey AI vs Spellbook
actions.rationale: Competitor-comparison prompts ("X vs Y") are over-represented in your prompt set and currently surface third-party listicles, not your own domain.

actions.title: Listicle: Top 7 workflows AI can automate for legal teams
actions.rationale: AI search engines lean heavily on listicle-format pages for category overviews; you're absent from this format on your own domain.

actions.title: Demo video: 'Reviewing a 60-page contract in under 5 minutes'
actions.rationale: Video demonstrations of speed/efficiency claims drive citations from review sites that quote runtimes.

actions.title: Add structured data (Product + FAQPage) to legora.com landing pages
actions.rationale: AI search engines heavily favor pages with schema.org markup. Your landing pages currently have only basic Organization markup.

actions.title: Publish an OpenGraph + JSON-LD-rich /integrations page
actions.rationale: Integration prompts ("X integrates with Word/Google Docs") often cite vendor /integrations pages. legora.com/integrations doesn't exist.

actions.title: Engage in r/LegalTech threads on AI document review
actions.rationale: AI engines frequently cite Reddit threads on legaltech tooling. r/LegalTech has multiple high-traffic threads with no Legora mention.

actions.title: Pitch case study to Legaltech News
actions.rationale: Legaltech News articles are repeatedly cited as sources for AI-tool roundups. A signed customer case study would close a high-value gap.

actions.title: Get included in 'Best AI tools for law firms' listicles
actions.rationale: Of the 12 listicles AI engines cite for the category, you appear in 3. Outreach to the remaining 9 has the highest visibility ROI.

target.category: Best AI tools for law firms

actions.title: Sponsor or co-produce a video with a legaltech YouTube channel
actions.rationale: Video sources are increasingly cited by Gemini and Perplexity for product evaluation queries.
